zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Mainwaring IV of chester於1316年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight30歲，母親Lady Mary Davenport29歲。他於大約1339年與Joan de Praers在英國爾米德列維其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1365年在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Mainwaring IV of chester于1316年出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight30岁，母亲Lady Mary Davenport29岁。他于大约1339年与Joan de Praers在英国爾米德列維其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1365年在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written អ៊ីវ, unexplained. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number IV (meaning ‘the fourth’ of the four bearers of the name) may also be counted as a surname Iv.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Mainwaring IV of chester was born in 1316, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight, was 30 and his mother, Lady Mary Davenport, was 29. He married Joan de Praers about 1339, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1365, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Marton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Mainwaring IV of chester est né en 1316, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Davenport, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Praers environ 1339, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1365, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Marton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Mainwaring IV of chester 1316 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight 30 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Davenport 29. Er hat um 1339 in Middlewich, Cheshire, England Joan de Praers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Marton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Mainwaring IV of chester è nato il nel 1316 nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Davenport, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Praers circa 1339, nel Middlewich, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1365, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Marton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Mainwaring IV of chesterが1316年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父Sir William Mainwaring III , Knightは30歳，母Lady Mary Davenportは29歳であった。約1339年にイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチでJoan de Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1365年に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Mainwaring IV of chester(이)가 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Davenport(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1339년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 Joan de Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1365년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Mainwaring IV of chester nasceu em 1316, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Davenport, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Praers aproximadamente 1339, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1365, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Marton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Mainwaring IV of chester родился в 1316 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Davenport, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Praers около 1339 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1365 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности мартон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan de Praers aproximadamente 1339, en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1365, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Marton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
